name: Abbott Laboratories
h1: Abbott Laboratories's GCC footprint in India
lede: Abbott Laboratories runs five centers across three Indian cities. Mumbai, New Delhi and Bengaluru, covering GBS, R&D and CoE, built over 24 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Abbott Laboratories office in India. We map five, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Abbott Laboratories GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Abbott Laboratories runs 5 verified centers across 3 Indian cities (Mumbai, New Delhi, Bengaluru), covering GBS, R&D and CoE. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

titles.title: DVP, Abbott and MD, Abbott India Limited

about.description: Abbott Laboratories's India footprint covers Mumbai, New Delhi and Bengaluru, spanning GBS, R&D and CoE. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 291 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.a: Abbott Laboratories operates 5 active centers in India.

faq.a: Abbott Laboratories's India footprint includes Mumbai and 2 additional cities.

faq.a: Abbott Laboratories runs GBS and 2 additional center types centers in India.
